Document:
# Security Medical Staff
This is where I would put the Corpsman & Brigmedic Figurine.. IF I HAD ONE!
- Must perform job responsibilities over everything else. In the absence of such responsibilities they may request to perform [bold][color=#004d75]Security Officer[/bold][/color] duties from the [bold][color=#DB9D3B]Head of Security[/bold][/color]. They are still expected to drop [bold][color=#004d75]Security Officer[/bold][/color] duties when their job responsibilities arise.
- May only perform arrests if a crime has occurred within their sight or hearing range, or if they are acting as an additional [bold][color=#004d75]Security Officer[/bold][/color] under the [bold][color=#DB9D3B]Head of Security[/bold][/color]'s permission.
- Should not put themselves in excessive [bold][color=red]Danger[/bold][/color], such as tackling threats or dangerous individuals alone and front-lining on [bold][color=red]Code Red[/bold][/color]
They are still permitted to fight alongside [bold][color=#004d75]Security[/bold][/color], just not at the front because they are vital for the continued health of the department, and will be considered negligent in their duties if they do so.
- Must always keep their provided medical equipment on them at all times.
## Has the Authority to: This is added on top of any individual authorities granted to [bold][color=#25739c]Security Medical Staff[/bold][/color].
- Temporarily detain and force Tracker Implants on Security Staff if they refuse to turn on their PDA coordinates on [bold][color=#1E90FF]Code Blue[/bold][/color] or higher, but only for threats listed within the [bold][textlink="Security Almanac" link="security-almanac"][/bold].
Eg. Forcing a tracker implant over some vent spiders is not acceptable, but forcing it when there are [bold][color=cyan]Changelings[/color][/bold] around is.
The individual in question refusing coordinates also has the choice to be dismissed from the [bold][color=#004d75]Security Department[/bold][/color] instead of taking the tracking implant.
- Make Medical-Well-Being judgements on [bold][color=#004d75]Security Staff[/bold][/color]
Such as ordering an [bold][color=#004d75]Security Officer[/bold][/color] to stop drinking, as they have gone into critical condition from their alcoholism before.
Stamped paperwork by the [bold][color=#25739c]Security Medical Staff[/bold][/color] will be required for the order to be enforceable.
## Responsible For: This is added on top of any individual responsibilities granted to [bold][color=#25739c]Security Medical Staff[/bold][/color]. - Ensuring overall health of [bold][color=#004d75]Security Staff[/bold][/color] is Good. - Tending to injuries of Prisoners and [bold][color=#004d75]Security Staff[/bold][/color]. - Stabilizing [bold][color=#004d75]Security Staff[/bold][/color]. - Reviving deceased [bold][color=#004d75]Security Staff[/bold][/color]. - Performing [bold][color=cyan]Changeling[/color][/bold] blood-tests.
See: [bold][textlink="Blood Testing Procedures" link="security-almanac"][/bold] - Performing Implant Removal.
See: [bold][textlink="Implant Removal Procedures" link="security-almanac"][/bold]
